_comment: Central source registry. Every URL verified live before entry (see CLAUDE.md ledger). 'url' = course/home link; 'watch' = verified lecture-video page (rendered as 'Watch lectures'); 'label' = visible annotation after the link. Books link only to Open Library work pages. Sources without verifiable official URLs stay plain text.
